almbark2015.title: Acoustic analysis of the Syrian Arabic vowel system
almbark2015.pagination: The ICPhS 2015 proceedings paper carries no printed folio; `page` records the paper-internal page (1-5), which coincides with the PDF page index.
almbark2015.describes: Damascene / Syrian Arabic (speakers from Damascus and coastal Syria)

jasim2020.title: Tafxi:m in the vowels of Muslawi Qəltu and Baghdadi Gilit dialects of Arabic
jasim2020.pagination: Printed folio is centred/right in the page footer; printed page = pdftotext page index − 23 (verified on the Abbreviations page and on body pages 17, 18, 37).
jasim2020.describes: Baghdadi Gilit (Muslim Baghdad) and Muslawi Qəltu (Mosul)

fadda2016.title: Language Variation in Western Amman
fadda2016.venue: MA thesis, Canada Institute of Linguistics
fadda2016.pagination: Printed folio is in the page header and coincides with the PDF page index (verified on pages 15, 29, 30, 33).

cotter2016.title: One Piece of the Puzzle: Notes on the Historic Interdental Fricatives /θ, ð, ðˤ/ in the Arabic Dialect of Gaza City
cotter2016.venue: Journal of Arabic and Islamic Studies 16:149-162
cotter2016.pagination: Printed folio in the running head (`Historic /θ, ð, ðˤ/ in Gaza Arabic  <n>`); the article runs 149-162.

brissos2014.title: New insights into Portuguese central-southern dialects: understanding their present and past forms through acoustic data from stressed vowels
brissos2014.pagination: Printed folio in the running head (`66  Fernando Brissos` / `Portuguese central-southern dialects  67`).
brissos2014.describes: Portuguese central-southern dialects: CI = the central-interior subdialect (Castelo Branco / Beira Baixa); SW = the southwestern subdialect (Baixo Alentejo / Alentejo littoral)
